name: sendEmail
description: Sends a plain-text email from the authenticated Gmail account. Supports cc/bcc and optional threading by passing replyToMessageId (which copies threadId and sets In-Reply-To/References so the reply lands in the same thread).

to.description: Recipient email address, or an array of recipient email addresses.

replyToMessageId.description: Optional Gmail message ID to reply to. When set, the new email is threaded with the original and uses In-Reply-To/References headers.
